matcher_value: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; $mem = Get-CimInstance Win32_PhysicalMemory | Select-Object BankLabel, DeviceLocator, Capacity, Speed, Manufacturer, PartNumber; $total = ($mem | Measure-Object -Property Capacity -Sum).Sum; [pscustomobject]@{ dimm_count = @($mem).Count; total_physical_memory_bytes = [int64]$total; modules = $mem } | ConvertTo-Json -Compress -Depth 6
